hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Hạ Long Hon Gai Centre (Tru by Hilton Ha Long Hon Gai Centre)

reviews.title: Review April 30, 2026
reviews.text:
Everything is okay, clean and convenient except for the bathroom exhaust fan, which I can't turn on myself as the hotel operates it on a default schedule, making it stuffy and smelly after using the restroom. 

Additionally, the hotel checkout takes quite a long time because they need to check the room. When I asked the staff if it was done, they said I could leave early if I was busy??? It's very confusing to wait for something that seems pointless.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

First and foremost, please accept our sincere apologies for the inconvenience you experienced during the check-out process.

As your stay coincided with a public holiday, there was an unusually high volume of rooms being checked out at the same time. This resulted in delays in room inspections, and we regret that we were unable to promptly update you on the status. When you reached out, our staff did their best to offer a flexible solution in case you needed to depart urgently.

We truly regret that the waiting time and the lack of clear communication affected your overall experience. Please be assured that we take your feedback seriously and will work on improving our procedures and coordination, especially during peak periods.

Thank you very much for your understanding and valuable feedback. We sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide you with a better experience.

Yours sincerely,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Evaluation
reviews.text: Ideal location, close to Vincom, near the coastal road.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your review! We’re happy to hear you enjoyed our ideal location near Vincom and the scenic coastal road. We look forward to welcoming you again!

Warm regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good Value, but not close to the Cruise Terminals
reviews.negatives:
It's necessary to taxi to the Cruise Terminals
There's only one Bar/Restaurant nearby that's air-conditioned, had great selection of cold Beers and western menu.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is enthusiastic, open, and friendly; the hotel is in a very convenient location to stay and has many amenities.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your feedback. We're delighted to hear that you had a great experience with our team and enjoyed the convenience and amenities of the hotel. Your kind words truly mean a lot to us. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future!

Warm regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Brand new hotel, clean and great location
reviews.positives: very clean, in the center of the city, firm bed!
reviews.negatives: electricity black out on a saturday morning and the staff was not aware.....( may be only my floor?)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Stayed for one night. Very clean room. Limited space but perfect for a couple. About 20 mins to the port. Modern building.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We’re delighted to hear that you found the room very clean and suitable for your stay as a couple. It’s great to know that our modern facilities and convenient location met your expectations.

We truly appreciate your kind words and hope to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Perfect location with modern & clean set-up.
reviews.positives: Stayed here for Ha Long Bay Marathon - location was amazing! Around 15min by walk to the gun start. Right next to the mall & market. Breakfast can improve but it was good enough.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: very great
reviews.text: My personal experience with this hotel is wonderful, everything is good from the hotel room to the lobby space and the service staff, everything is excellent.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued guest,
 
Thank you so much for your wonderful review!

We are truly delighted to hear that you had such a great experience at our hotel. It’s fantastic to know that you were satisfied with everything — from the room and atmosphere to the reception area and the service provided by our staff.

Your kind words mean a lot to us and motivate our team to continue delivering excellent service. We sincerely hope to welcome you back again in the near future!
Best regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Modern hotel with superb location, amazing breakfast view!
reviews.positives: We stayed here for Ha Long Bay Marathon and it was the best choice made - great location and clean/modern hotel!
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.text:
We really loved our stay in this hotel!!
The rooms are spacious, beds are super comfy ❤️ the hotel is relatively new, reception staff were super accommodating.

Breakfast selection is nice, food is delicious. We had a feast after we ran the Halong Bay Marathon lol.

It's conveniently located beside Vincom Plaza so grocery shopping is not a problem. They have a nice lounging area, a gym, and a self-service laundry area.

Perfect for those who will be running the Halong Bay Marathon in the future!
reviews.response:
Dear Valued guest,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We’re delighted to hear that you had an excellent stay with us. It’s great to know you enjoyed our spacious rooms, comfortable beds, delicious breakfast, and convenient facilities such as the gym and self-service laundry.

We’re especially happy that our location and services were helpful during your Halong Bay Marathon trip — congratulations on finishing the race! 🏃‍♀️✨

Your kind words about our reception team truly mean a lot. We’ll make sure to share your compliments with them.

We look forward to welcoming you back, especially if you join the Halong Bay Marathon again in the future. ❤️

Warm regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Clean, modern, conevenient, great facilities
reviews.positives: Clean, modern, convenient
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I have stayed at Hongai for about 10 years, and I think it is outstanding in both cleanliness and atmosphere for a hotel in this price range. I will be here for the time being.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Shinobu,

Thank you very much for your continued patronage and for choosing Tru by Hilton Ha Long Hon Gai Centre during your recent business trip.

We are truly grateful for your generous feedback and perfect ratings in all aspects of your stay. Your kind words regarding the cleanliness and atmosphere of our hotel are deeply appreciated. It is an honor to have welcomed you over the years, and we are sincerely thankful for the trust you have placed in us.

We are also delighted to know that you have enjoyed your time in Hon Gai City. It brings us great joy to be a part of your positive experience in this charming and ever-developing area.

Please rest assured that we will continue striving to provide the highest level of comfort and hospitality for all our valued guests. Should there be anything we can do to make your future stays more pleasant, please do not hesitate to let us know.

We look forward to the pleasure of welcoming you again soon.

With sincere appreciation,
H

reviews.title: This hotel caters the need of the clients. The members of the staff are approacheable and hospitable.
reviews.positives: The members of the staff are accommodating. They are approacheable. The room is clean and comfy. Perfect for solo travellers like me. It is also recommendable for couples and friends. Good value. It's all Worth it. They offer laundry service and the customers are allowed to use the kitchen. It has got high-tech appliances. In addition, the clients are also allowed to enjoy the gym.
reviews.negatives: It hasn't got a water heater for drinking purposes inside the room; however no worries because clients can go to the 10th floor to use the kitchen freely. So boiling watwr won't be a problem anymore.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: So amazing, I will definitely be back here if I come back ❤️
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your exceptional feedback! We’re so happy to hear you had a wonderful stay and will choose to stay with us again. We can’t wait to welcome you back! ❤️

Warm regards,
Huyen Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.negatives: Quizás lo que menos es que no está cerca de los puertos de dónde salen las embarcaciones para ver Halong Bay, pero ellos tienen servicio de Taxi y te lo reservan con mucha facilidad.

reviews.positives: Очень чистый номер, вкусный завтрак, а также потрясающий персонал! Обрадовало, что был даже заменитель сахара в кафе.
reviews.negatives: Не нашлось недостатков.

reviews.title: Doskonałe miejsce na nocleg
reviews.positives: Wszystko ok.

reviews.title: Świetny nowoczesny hotel ze wszystkimi udogodnieniami.
reviews.positives: Bardzo nowoczesny k komfortowy hotel- wszystko sterowane automatycznie, można sobie nawet wybrać kolor światła w łazience. Czyściutko, wielkie wygodne łóżko i bardzo miła i chętna do pomocy obsługa. W hotelu bardzo dobre owoce morza w bardzo przystępnej cenie. Śniadanie serwowane ponieważ byliśmy poza sezonem ale pyszne!
reviews.negatives: Nic

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Nothing was good, weird rooms bathroom was like a cubicle stuffy like a student accommodation.

reviews.title: Clean good value for money
reviews.negatives: Rooms clean and good value for money

reviews.title: Overall hotel is clean and nice to stay.
reviews.positives: Pleasant stay and nice view from the lobby. Hotel is clean and been for ha long bay marathon and starting point just 1km+ away which is good for a warm up before the run. Easily travel to sun world as well.

reviews.title: Very comfortable and convenient
reviews.positives: Location is near the bay and have a view.

reviews.title: Stylish hotel and good value-but eat elsewhere
reviews.positives: Beautiful futuristic bedroom with sci fi bathroom pod and panoramic view over halong bay. Helpful staff
reviews.negatives: Terrible breakfast. Tiny coffee. Tiny fruit juice. Only two pieces of tiny white bread and toaster switched off so we had to wait for it to warm up. No vegetarian options. Laughably bad! Impersonal atmosphere.

reviews.title: Comfy stay for a few days
reviews.positives: Small but smart room, you have there everything you need. Quite comfortable and clean. Breakfast was fine, location is great
reviews.negatives: The only thing is that A/c is directed on your bed

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The location is very near nice sea view, and shopping mall. very suitable for people to have a walk nearby and shopping nearby. it only take distance 30 mins grab to take ship cruise from the hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location is on point. For us we prefer this area more than Bai Chay area. Just few steps walk then you will have the amazing bay view. The staffs are helpful and kind. Facilities are new. Bed is comfy. Perfect for a weekend gateaway.

reviews.title: Modern, clean and practical. A good base to discover Ha Long bay for a few days. Very friendly staff, comfortable rooms
reviews.positives: Modern and well equipped with a view over the bay.
reviews.negatives: Felt like there wasn’t much happening in the neighborhood.

reviews.title: perfect
reviews.positives: The staff, especially Ms.Hien was a superb staff. Helped us make our stay a memorable one. Assisted us in all our needs and bookings. similary ms. HA and Ms. Cuc.

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.positives: Modern, clean and closed to the see.
reviews.negatives: Issue with the aircon, but nothing serious

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The view is amazing. Hana and Ha are very helpful and wonderful people. I will be back again. Thank you so much.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very clean room high quality
reviews.negatives: Very friendly staff

reviews.title: 8 day Halong stay
reviews.positives: Comfortable, very close to shops, coffee, my partners family and absolutely everything.
reviews.negatives: No dislikes at all.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: modern funky hotel. Staff were awesome esp Sophia who accommodated all our requests with a smile.

reviews.title: Relaxing and brand new place to stay
reviews.positives: The hotel is or at least look brand new. The room was okey size, the bed was big and there was a great view. There is a shared kirchen that guests can you, but there is also a restaurant and, bar and terrace. The gym was great! They also have washing machines. Next to the hotel is Vincom shopping mall with movie theater.
reviews.negatives: A bit pricey, but brand new. There wasn’t that many restaurants nearby.

reviews.title: Great hotel for short trip
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel for one night !
